findings.title: Possible HTML-entity artifact in link
findings.suggested_fix: Link returns 400, but the URL contains `&` (HTML-encoded ampersand) — likely a Firecrawl scrape artifact. The actual rendered link in the browser is almost certainly fine. Manual spot-check recommended.
